titleZh: 中国ICT行业的透明性与不透明性：对中国公司治理规范的批评
titleEn: Transparency and Opaqueness in the Chinese ICT Sector: A Critique of Chinese and International Corporate Governance Norms
authors: Asian Journal of Comparative Law contributors
abstractZh: 从披露实践与制度执行层面评估中国企业治理透明度，讨论信息披露与投资者保护的衔接。
abstractEn: A critical comparative study of governance norms and disclosure quality in major Chinese ICT listed entities.
